playbook.intent: One post per week to reinforce agency niche + earn 1-2 inbound replies per post.
playbook.scope: Founder publishes one LinkedIn / X post per week that reinforces agency niche + earns 1-2 inbound replies. Output: post drafted, scheduled, engagement plan. Exit artifact: published post + reply log + 1 follow-up DM.

success-criteria.criterion: Post anchored to a defined content pillar

stage.name: Pick the angle

tasks.task: Pick the content pillar for the week
Surface 1 concrete insight from recent work

stage.decision-gate: Advance once angle ties to a real pillar + lived insight.

stage.name: Draft
stage.intent: Hook + payoff + ask in 200 words or less.

tasks.task: End with an explicit ask or CTA

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when hook stands alone without context.

stage.name: Schedule + engage
stage.intent: Publish at peak slot, reply to every comment for 24h.

tasks.task: Send 1 thoughtful DM to a high-signal reply

stage.decision-gate: Required: 1+ qualified reply + 1 follow-up DM logged.

extra.value: [Daily posting cadence - weekly only, Paid LinkedIn ads - separate playbook]
[ICP one-pager + 3-4 content pillars defined, Personal LinkedIn / X profile aligned with agency positioning]
[Posting generic 'thought leadership' - invisible to ICP, Skipping reply cadence - kills algorithmic distribution, Treating likes as success - measure replies + DMs]
['Does the post embarrass me with how on-niche it is?', 'Did I reply to every comment within 24h?', 'Did I send the inbound DM, or just admire it?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-linkedin-positioning-post --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-linkedin-positioning-post --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-linkedin-positioning-post --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
